itemListElement.reviewBody:
Worst school ever.. nobody really cares about a children’s value for education .. every child lacks in basic English communication and reading skills there . Principal is least bothered about any complaints. Correspondents are busy with opening branches . Your child will.loose basic skills if you ever enrolled here . Hopes campus coimbatore is better to be said as a daycare than a school .. bathroom locks won't work properly. Kids hit each other even in 4th std . Kids will fail in any school admission entrance after here. even in another montessori school your child will not be able to clear. Literally 0 education
In the name of montessori

itemReviewed.name: Prodigy International Montessori School - Balan Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: This school truly understands what parents value most—the all-round development and happiness of their children. Unlike typical schools that focus only on academics, here children are encouraged to explore their talents through special events like regular field trips, Sales Day, Yoga, Varmam, Silambam, Cosmic Camp-out, along with traditional cultural and extracurricular activities. In today's world, where many institutions burden middle class parents with hidden costs, this school remains refreshingly transparent, charging only a reasonable fee. Choosing this school means investing wisely in your child's future, providing meaningful life experiences, confidence that your child is in warm and trustworthy hands, and a world of opportunities without the heavy financial pressure.

itemReviewed.name: Prodigy International Montessori School - Balan Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I'm one of the parent of Prodigy kids. I post this review after awaiting one year to experience how Prodigy works at Maria Montessori's theory and philosophy of education. I'm truly contented with their approach and guidance towards kids by means of Montessori method.
Children are not identical widgets. What works best for some works worst for others, and vice versa. As said, I do approve of the core of Montessori education, where tasks are developmentally ordered.
When education is child-directed in such a fashion, it’s GREAT.
Here, in Prodigy, they treat children what they are. They focus on everything what a child needs in this stage. That's the great thing.
Therefore I strongly recommend Prodigy International Montessori School to get better future(life).
"Education cannot be effective unless it helps a child to open up himself to life." - Maria Montessori.

itemReviewed.name: Prodigy International Montessori School - Balan Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Best school in coimbatore . Being a doctor I was hell bent to find a stress free educational system or opt for home schooling . We see a lot of youngster failing to cope with the fast evolving society and getting absorbed in social media and gaming . Most schools has Montessori in their name but stick to conventional teaching methodology. In prodigy not only they adher strictly  to the system , they themselves are a Montessori training institute . So I am very happy to get my child the very best education I could find

itemReviewed.name: Prodigy International Montessori School - Balan Nagar
Prodigy International Montessori School - Balan Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I would like to share my gratitude for this school.My kid always look forward for the school days and she had a great time there.I am satisfied that I have given a good foundation for my daughter.The staffs are very supportive, especially approachable and highly professional.The non teaching staffs are also very kind and supportive.We have had a good experience overall.Thanks again.

itemReviewed.name: Prodigy International Montessori School - Balan Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
We have been with the school for past 8 years. And for me its really a superb school with dedicated, supportive and caring staffs. A school with free of homework, exams and marksheets. But nurturing students with commitment and dedication towards their work without any supervision and follow up. They train students to be good at both academics and as well as co-curricular activities. They help them to become independent in all ways and also they make the students to work in unity as well.  They motivate students to become more creative. Very responsible management they strive very hard to make the students to become best out of it. Doubts are cleared then and there and they accept our suggestion whenever it is necessary. We really thank the School Management (Mr. Araving and Dr. Jain Aravind, Principal) and caring staffs (Ms. Saranya, Ms. Vidya, Ms. Nandhini, Ms. Sujithra, Ms. Sreeja, Ms, Rajalakshmi and Mr. Murugesan sir) for their wonderful job. And also would like to thank other co-curricular staffs (Mr. Selvam, Mr. Naveen, Ms. Nalini) and admin staffs. We also appreciate their tireless work towards the upliftment of the students.
Great Job! Go ahead kudos!!!

itemReviewed.name: Prodigy International Montessori School - Balan Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: We have admitted our twin kids in this school for grade 1. Absolutely wonderful school where kids would love to go everyday.. Teachers are their best friends that they feel bad if they are absent to school.. Atmosphere s too good n relaxing.. Apart from curriculum all the aspects of a child are taken care of.. The child s unique talents r exposed here with lots of opportunities through which they become so confident n stage fear ll be erased from their minds soon..a playground can be set in coming days tats missing in this campus.. Otherwise I m jus totally satisfied with my kids progress.
